PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-02-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Nov-22-2017 is admitted to probate. Lisa Ann Passin is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Frank Mahoney III is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Dec-12-2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed before Dec-07-2022, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-19-2021 Continued To Nov-02-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-14-2021 Continued To Oct-19-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Nancy Gibbons, via ZOOM, for Lisa Passin, Petitioner; Trisha Friedeberg, via ZOOM, for Greg Schoenfeld, Interested Party.

The court begins by confirming with Ms. Friedeberg that her client has no objections to this petition. Ms. Gibbons then reports that she has received the original wills that she plans to lodge with the court. Ms. Gibbons advises that they are pour-over wills ands asks if she might need to file an amended petition. The court instructs Ms. Gibbons to coordinate with the assigned Examiner to confirm whether she needs to amend her petition or not. Regardless, the court instructs Ms. Gibbons to file any supplements two (2) weeks prior to the next calling of this matter.

The Petition for Probate of Will and For Letters Testamentary is continued to Oct-19-2021 at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-24-2021 Continued To Sep-14-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Nancy Gibbons appeared by telephone for Lisa Passin.
Trisha Friedeberg appeared by zoom for Greg Schoenfeld (Heir).

Ms. Gibbons stated that these assets were omitted by the Trustors. Ms. Friedberg stated that her Client wasn't initially noticed until the Court raised the issue, that her Client has requested information from Ms. Gibbons, but hasn't received a response and requested a short continuance to allow petitioner's counsel to provide responses. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to September 14, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Vedica Puri. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
